name: Shared base
description: Sections merged into every template: Brand, Contact, Theme. Do not load this directly as a template.

hint.label: Your business identity
hint.description: Your logo appears at the top of every page and in the footer. The founded year shows visitors you're established and trustworthy.

hint.label: How people reach you
hint.description: These details show up in the footer and contact area of your site. Visitors use them to call, email, or find your location.

hint.label: The overall feel of your site
hint.description: The accent color is used for buttons and highlights across the whole page. The brand tone tells the AI what voice to use when writing — professional, friendly, luxury, or casual.
